caption.full:
The Earliest Show is getting a TV revival with Ben Schwartz writing.

The cult comedy The Earliest Show has been officially greenlit for a television series. Ben Schwartz will write and direct all episodes, joined by original stars Lauren Lapkus, Kevin Carroll, and Ryan Gaul as series regulars. Henry Winkler and Brandon Scott Jones are set for recurring roles.

Send this to a fan of The Earliest Show!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #TheEarliestShow #BenSchwartz
caption.firstComment: I’m here for Ben Schwartz writing and directing — who else is rewatching the original clips ahead of the premiere?
